records.description_text: Grants you and your minions [15] additional armour per point
You and your minions deal [6%] increased damage per point.
You have additional ward decay threshold. Additionally, whenever a nearby enemy, ally, or minion dies, you have a chance to gain ward.

Your minions have [4%] increased attack and cast speed per point.

This bonus applies to you as well, if you have used a minion skill in the past 10 seconds.

Grants you [1] vitality per point

Grants your minions [9%] increased health per point
When damage leaves you below half health, you summon a {Revenant,} a melee minion with decaying health whose damage scales with your intelligence. This effect has a 15 second cooldown.
You deal [12%] increased damage per point, but if you have killed an enemy in the past four seconds your current health is drained by [1%] per second per point.

+[5%] ward retention per point

+[8] necrotic and poison protection per point
You have a chance to poison on hit, and additional poison resistance.
A percentage of your current health is drained each second, but you gain a percentage of your missing health as ward each second.
You and your minions deal increased necrotic damage and you have a chance to apply Damned on hit.
Your minions have 4% increased armour and protections per character level.
You deal increased poison damage and your minions have a chance to poison on hit.
You and your minions deal increased physical damage and have increased bleed duration

Your minions have [5%] increased health and armour per point.

Your minions reflect [5] damage to attackers when hit per point.
You and your minions deal [6%] increased physical and necrotic damage per point
You have additional ward per second for each minion you have active, up to 20 minions.
Your minions have a chance to shred armor on hit.
Your minions leech a percentage of the damage they deal as health.
+1 Maximum Skeletons
Your minions have additional chance to critically strike.
You have [3%] increased health per point, but your minions have [3%] reduced health per point.
A percentage of your damage taken is redirected to your lowest health minion.
You and your minions have [4%] increased attack and cast speed per point.
Grants you and your minions [1] vitality per point

Your minions deal +[1] necrotic damage with spells and attacks per point

Your minions deal +[1] fire damage with spells and attacks per point
You and your minions have increased critical strike chance and leech a percentage of critical strike damage dealt as health.
Minions have [7%] chance per point to poison with melee attacks and [17] additional poison protection per point
+1 Maximum Skeletal Mages

When you cast a spell you sacrifice 5% of your current health to give your minions haste and frenzy for [1] second[s] per point.

This effect has a 10 second cooldown.
You deal [5%] increased damage per point. This bonus is tripled when you are below 35% health.
You and your minions have a chance to inflict bleed and frostbite on hit.
When you drop below half health you gain [9] ward per point. This effect has a 12 second cooldown.\n\nWard is a decaying shield that protects your health.
You and your minions deal increased damage over time.
Instead of healing you, your leech drains the health of an enemy within 6 meters every 0.25 seconds.
When a hit taken leaves you below half health, you gain ward based on your uncapped poison resistance. This effect has a 6 second cooldown.
Your spells and melee attacks instantly kill enemies that they leave below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

[7%] increased poison damage per point

[7%] increased poison duration per point

Grants you and your minions [4%] increased health regen per point

Grants [1] vitality per point
You have additional Intelligence, but your elemental resistances are lowered.
You deal [14%] increased damage per point, but [1%] of your current health is drained per second per point.

+[5%] ward retention per point

+[5] mana per point
[10%] increased critical strike chance and [3%] increased attack and cast speed per point

You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping a dagger or axe in your offhand. While dual wielding, you have increased attack and cast speed, but take more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
+[30] physical, necrotic, and poison penetration per point
Your and your minions deal additional spell necrotic damage and melee necrotic damage.
You have additional health, and a percentage of hit damage taken from bosses and rare enemies is dealt over 4 seconds instead.
If you have used a potion in the past 4 seconds you have [50] additional elemental, void, necrotic, and poison protection per point, but lose [1%] of your current health per second per point.
[10%] increased damage over time per point if you're holding a one handed weapon without a shield
[10%] increased spell damage per point if you're holding a one handed weapon without a shield
You have a chance to poison on hit, and take less poison damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
You gain additional leech and have significantly increased leech and leech rate, but your leech stacks are removed when you reach 66% health instead of 100%.

You deal increased fire damage and have a chance to ignite on hit with fire skills, and you deal increased necrotic damage and have a chance to inflict damned on hit with necrotic skills.

These effects also apply to your minions.

You gain additional ward decay threshold and you gain ward on kill. 

You also gain ward per 3 points of Intelligence while channeling a skill.
Your {Rip Blood's} hits have a chance to inflict bleed on enemies.
You take less damage while channeling and deal more damage to damned enemies while channeling (both multiplicative with other modifiers).
A portion of the damage you do is returned to you as health over 3 seconds.
You gain ward and mana when you use a potion.
When you directly cast a {Curse} skill you also afflict a number of enemies around the target location with {Anguish}.

Your hits have a chance to deal double damage.

Additionally your hits have a chance to deal double damage per {Curse} on the target.
The Chains from the {Chains of Ruin} node last longer. Additionally damned that you inflict last longer.

You have a chance to gain {Haste} for 2 seconds when you kill a {Cursed} enemy or hit a {Cursed} boss or rare enemy.

Additionally {Haste} on you has increased effect.

{Witchfire} that you inflict deals more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per 1% global chance to ignite with fire skills and per 1% global chance to inflict damned with necrotic skills.

Additionally while you have {Ignite} or {Damned Overload} your hits spread {Witchfire} to a number of enemies within 10 meters.
You have increased health and you deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack of each negative ailment on you up to a maximum of 90.
Health leech also grants increased damage.
You have more health (multiplicative with other modifiers) and gain a percentage of your maximum health as endurance threshold.
Grants [7%] increased elemental damage per point
Grants [7] health and [3] mana per point
When you hit an enemy with a fire skill you {Ignite} additional nearby enemies. This effect has a 5 second cooldown.
Grants [3%] increased cast speed and melee attack speed per point
Every 10 seconds when you hit an enemy with a lightning ability you cast arcane lightning at up to [1] other enem[y] around them per point.

Increases your chance to freeze and converts lightning blast and volcanic orb to cold spells, changing their base damage type to cold and giving them a chance to freeze.

Lightning Blast gains a base freeze rate of 46.

Volcanic Orb's core gains a base freeze rate of 40 and its shrapnel gains a freeze rate of 32.
Grants [7%] increased critical strike chance, and [3%] additional critical strike multiplier.
+[10%] ward retention per point.

You deal increased fire and lightning damage.

You gain ward when you use a lightning skill or a fire skill. This effect has a 7 second cooldown, but the cooldown is not shared between different elements, so you can gain ward from a fire skill and a lightning skill within the same 7 second duration.
Every 10 seconds when you hit an enemy with a cold ability you chill up to [1] enem[y] around them per point.
Every 10 seconds when you hit an enemy with a cold ability you chill up to [1] enem[y] around them per point.
[7%] increased spell damage per point.
Adds [1] intelligence and [3] mana per point
[5%] increased cast speed per point if you have cast a spell in the past 2 seconds
You gain ward based on your current mana when you directly use a skill that costs at least 40 mana.

[6%] increased fire damage per point

[2%] chance to ignite per point on hit with fire skills per point

+[7%] chance to chill on hit with per point (doubled for cold skills)

+[7%] chance to chill attackers when hit per point

[5%] increased spell damage per point

Doubled if you have used a skill that costs at least 40 mana recently

+[40] lightning penetration per point

+[0.2%] of lightning damage leeched as health per point

+[40] cold penetration per point

+[0.2%] of cold damage leeched as health per point

+[40] fire penetration per point

+[0.2%] of fire damage leeched as health per point
[10%] increased critical strike chance per point (doubled for lightning skills)
+[10%] critical strike multiplier with spells per point

Gain [10] ward per point when you hit an enemy with a fire spell (10 second cooldown)

Gain [10] ward per point when you hit an enemy with a cold spell (10 second cooldown)

Gain [10] ward per point when you hit an enemy with a lightning spell (10 second cooldown)
When you crit an enemy from at least 4 metres away you have a [6%] chance to cast spark nova at their location.

[5%] increased elemental damage per point

[5%] increased elemental protection per point

[5%] increased stun chance with elemental spells per point
You deal more lightning damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to shocked enemies.
You have additional mana and a portion of the damage you take is dealt to your mana before health.
Whenever you use a potion, you gain ward based on to your intelligence.

You have additional spell damage and you have a chance to refund a portion of the mana cost paid when directly using a skill.

These values are doubled if you have 300 maximum mana and tripled if you have 1000 maximum mana.
You have additional melee damage and spell damage.
Grants [5] elemental protection per point and [5%] increased elemental damage per point.

While moving or using a melee attack, you have a chance each second to cast {Fire Aura}. 

This chance is doubled if you have less than 3 stacks of {Fire Aura}.

When you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to cast {Frost Claw}.

This consumes mana equal to a portion of {Frost Claw's} mana cost.
You have increased armor and additional health.
Your melee attacks deal additional cold damage and you have a higher chance to freeze enemies.
Your {Fire Auras} from all sources deal damage in a larger area.
Gain [1%] increased melee lightning damage per point for four seconds on melee hit
Each stack of {Arcane Shielding} also grants increased armor.
Your melee attacks deal additional lightning damage and your lightning melee attacks have a chance to apply a {Spark Charge} on hit.
Grants [3%] increased melee attack speed per point, and a 10% chance to gain [3] ward per point on melee hit.
You deal increased lightning damage.
You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping a sword in your off hand. While dual wielding, you have increased attack and cast speed, but take more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
You have additional health and you have a chance to regain mana when you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy.
You have increased movement speed, attack speed, and dodge rating.
Your melee attacks deal additional lightning damage and you have a chance to parry attacks.
You have additional fire resistance and you have a chance to cast {Fire Aura} when you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy, up to a limited number of times per second.
You have additional armor and gain ward per second.
You have additional health and your ward decays more slowly.
Your melee attacks deal more elemental damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) if they cost 10 or more mana.

When you use a melee attack that costs less than 10 mana you gain a stack of {Blade Weaving}, up to a maximum.

When you use a melee attack that costs 10 or more mana the stacks are consumed and the attack deals 15% more elemental damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) per stack consumed.
You gain ward per second scaling with your intelligence.

You have additional mana.

When you indirectly cast a spell you gain a stack of {Blade Conduit} for 4 seconds, up to 6 stacks. Each stack grants increased mana regeneration.
The increased mana regen is doubled if you have at least 50 Intelligence.
After using a traversal skill, your next non-channeled spell has additional spell damage and a higher chance to critically strike.
While using a Catalyst you have additional Intelligence and take reduced bonus damage from critical strikes.
The spell damage and crit chance from the {Never Late} node now also apply to {Traversal} skills, and you gain ward when you use a {Traversal} skill.
You have additional critical strike multiplier while using a wand, additional ward retention while using a sceptre, and increased cast speed while using a staff.
You deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) to Bosses and Rare enemies.
You gain ward every 2 seconds.
Your damage over time has additional elemental penetration

You gain ward when you critically strike enemies.

This can trigger a maximum of 5 times per second.
You have additional armor while channeling per active {Rune} from {Runic Invocation}.
You deal more damage over time to {Branded} enemies (multiplicative with other modifiers).

When you directly use a Cold Skill you have a chance to gain {Runeword: Avalanche}, a buff that grants additional Spell Cold Damage and grants additional Endurance Threshold per stack of Ignite on the attacker.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and does not stack.
{Runeword Buffs} last longer.
After using a {Traversal} skill you gain increased cast speed and movement speed for a short duration. This buff cannot stack.
Your area skills have increased area, and when you directly use an area skill and hit an enemy you gain ward per active {Rune} from {Runic Invocation}.
You have additional endurance and maximum mana.

When you directly use a Fire Skill you have a chance to gain {Runeword: Inferno}, a buff that grants additional Spell Fire Damage and grants you more Armor per stack of Shock on the Attacker.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and does not stack.

When you directly use a Lightning Skill you have a chance to gain {Runeword: Hurricane}, a buff that grants additional Spell Lightning Damage and Freeze Rate Multiplier.

This buff lasts 6 seconds and does not stack.
You have additional spell damage, but your spells take longer to cast.
Every three seconds your next hit restores [6] health per point

You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping an axe or sword in your off hand. While dual wielding, you have increased attack and cast speed, but take more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

[5%] increased minion damage per point

Using a potion also heals your minions for [50%] per point of the amount it heals you
You and your minions deal [5%] increased melee damage per point, and leech [0.5%] of melee damage as health per point.
You and your minions deal [7%] increased spell damage per point

The healing from Hunters Restoration also applies to your minions.

When you trigger Hunter's Restoration, your minions gain [11%] increased damage per point for three second.

[7%] increased physical damage per point
[7%] increased cold damage per point
[7%] increased lightning damage per point

Your companions have 15% increased health

You revive companions 15% faster

While at low health (below 35%) you take less damage and deal more melee damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

Additionally, when damage leaves you at low health you gain these benefits for 5 seconds if you aren't already at low health.
You and your totems deal additional spell damage. This bonus is tripled while using an axe.
You deal additional melee damage with most two handed weapons. The amount and damage type depend on the type of weapon used.

Your totems have 15% increased health

Your totems are immune to poison damage
You and your minions deal [7%] increased melee damage per point

You and your companions have +[10] dodge rating per point.

[10%] increased companion revive range per point.

Every 5 seconds, your next melee attack deals increased damage and grants {Aspect of the Shark} for 3 seconds, a buff that grants 10% more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) and increases melee attack speed by 10%.

You are limited to only one companion.

Your companion is 15% larger and deals 50% more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

You are granted {Aspect of the Boar} for a duration when you use a traversal skill or Evade, a buff that grants 30% increased bleed duration and reduces damage taken by 15%. This effect has a 2 second cooldown. You also have additional endurance.
You and your companions have additional health, and you and your companions are healed whenever you use a companion ability.
Aspect of the Boar also grants [5%] increased physical damage per point and +[5%] chance to inflict bleed on hit per point.
Aspect of the Shark also grants [20%] chance to shred armour on hit per point

Your minions have [4%] increased attack speed, cast speed, and movement speed per point.

You revive companions [5%] faster per point.

{Aspect of the Boar} grants additional damage reduction, and now also grants increased health regeneration.

Additionally, your hits have a chance to grant you {Aspect of the Boar}.
You and your minions deal +[2] melee physical damage per point

You regain [7] health on kill per point

[5%] chance per point to gain Aspect of the Shark for 3 seconds on kill

(Aspect of the Shark increases melee damage by 50% and melee attack speed by 10%)

+[1] Vitality per point

+[5] health per point

[5%] increased minion health per point
All {Aspects} have increased duration, and you have additional health.

You and your companions have [5%] increased critical strike chance per point

When you use a companion ability you and your companions gain Aspect of the Lynx for [1] second per point

(Aspect of the Lynx grants 100% increased critical strike chance and 100% increased stun chance)

You and your companions have [3%] increased melee attack speed per point.

When you hit an enemy you have a [3%] chance per point to grant you and your companions Aspect of the Viper for 3 seconds.

(Aspect of the Viper grants 100% chance to poison on hit and 100% increased damage over time)
Aspect of the Shark has [15%] increased duration and effect per point

You are limited to only one companion.

Your companion has has 75% more health and damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
+1 Maximum Companions

You and your companions have +[10%] critical strike multiplier per point.

Aspect of the Lynx also grants +[10%] critical strike multiplier per point.
Aspect of the Viper lasts [15%] longer per point and also grants [5%] increased poison effect per point
Aspect of the Shark can stack multiple times, but is 60% less effective (multiplicative with other modifiers).
All Aspect buffs from this tree have [10%] increased duration per point
Aspect of the Lynx also grants [3%] of damage leeched as health on crit per point

+[1] Strength per point

You and your minions deal +[1] melee physical damage per point
You and your totems have additional armor while you have an active totem and you have increased mana regen while you have an active totem.
You and your minions deal [5%] increased damage per point and have +[5] stun avoidance per point
[5%] increased attack and cast speed per point while you have an active totem
You and your minions have additional health, a chance to shock and a chance to chill on hit.
You and your minions have increased lightning damage and additional lightning resistance.
You and your minions have increased cold damage, increased physical damage and additional dodge rating.
You and your minions have a chance to chill on hit, a higher chance to freeze enemies and additional cold resistance.

You and your minions gain increased stun chance.

Additionally, you have additional Endurance.
You and your minions gain additional spell lightning damage.
You have additional strength
You and your minions deal additional cold damage with spells and attacks, and your hits have a chance to inflict Frostbite.
[10%] increased elemental melee damage per point

You have additional physical and elemental resistance for each active totem.

Additionally, your totems have resistances against all damage types.
You and your minions have a higher chance to freeze enemies, and you have increased mana regeneration.
Your melee attacks deal additional lightning damage. Every 2 seconds, this effect is tripled for your next melee attack.

You have increased spell damage.
Your direct spell casts have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt}.
While channeling, you have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt} every second.
While you have an active totem you have more melee damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
Your melee attacks have a chance to cast {Storm Bolt} on hit. This effect can occur a limited number of times per second.

You have additional health and mana, and have a chance to cast {Maelstrom} when hit. 

This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

Your area skills have increased area, and you take less damage from shocked enemies.

Your totems also gain the area increases for area skills.
Increases healing effectiveness for you and your minions.
Increases cold damage and healing effectiveness for you and your minions.
You deal increased damage while transformed and your rage decays slower.
You have a chance to cast {Thorn Shield} on yourself when you are hit and you have increased armor and reflect damage back to attackers.
Increases the attack and cast speed of you and your minions.
Your rage only decays if you have used an ability recently (past 4 seconds).

Your melee hits have a 20% chance to grant you a stack of {Impervious} causing you to take less damage from hits (multiplicative with other modifiers), but you lose a stack when you are hit and you lose all stacks after 10 seconds of not gaining any stacks.
You and your minions deal additional physical damage with spells and melee attacks.
You gain the {Shapeshifter} buff for a limited duration when you transform, granting you increased armor and damage.
You have increased critical strike chance and multiplier while you have the {Shapeshifter} buff.
You are limitted to one companion, but that companion has more health (multiplicative with other modifiers). If you control a companion you deal increased damage and have additional armour.
You and your minions are healed when you transform. This scales with increases to healing effectiveness.
Your and your minions' hits have a chance to poison.
You and your companions have additional spell damage.
You and your minions have additional cold penetration.
You deal increased damage over time while transformed and take less damage over time in human form (multiplicative with other modifiers).
Your melee, throwing, and bow attacks have increased attack speed and deal additional physical damage.
You take less damage while moving (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have increased dodge rating.

You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping a sword or dagger in your off hand. While dual wielding, you have increased attack and cast speed, but take more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
You have a chance to gain {Haste} for one second on hit and deal increased damage based on your increased movement speed.
You have additional dodge rating and a chance to receieve a {Glancing Blow} when hit.
Every third melee, throwing, or bow attack deals increased damage.
You have a chance to poison on hit while you have a dagger or bow equipped.
When you directly use a skill that costs zero mana and hit an enemy you regain health and mana.
You have increased critical strike chance per sword, bow, or dagger you have equipped.
Every third non-channelling melee, throwing, or bow attack also inflicts bleed.
When you directly use a melee or bow attack that costs mana, it consumes additional mana to deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
You have additional health and whenever you receive a glancing blow you recover health.
You have increased dodge rating, and you gain health when hitting an enemy.
You have additional dexterity and you have a chance to receive a {Glancing Blow} when hit.
When you create a shadow you regain health, and skills used by shadows deal increased damage.
You deal additional physical damage with melee and throwing attacks, and you have additional dodge rating, doubled if you have been hit recently.
Skills that generate or consume {Flow} deal increased damage and have additional critical strike multiplier.
You deal increased physical damage and have a chance to inflict bleed on hit with melee and throwing attacks.
You have additional health and critical strike avoidance.

{Flow} is consumed when you use a 5th unique skill rather than a 4th, but the skill that consumes Flow has more critical strike chance and deals more damage over time (both multiplicative with other modifiers).

You have increased melee and throwing attack speed. When you use a melee or throwing attack and hit at least one enemy you have a chance to gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud}. Each stack of Dusk Shroud adds 50 dodge rating and 5% chance to receive a {Glancing Blow} when hit.
You have additional parry chance and increased critical strike chance.
Your dodge chance is added as twice as much chance to receive a glancing blow, but you cannot dodge.
You leech a portion of melee damage as health, and a portion of your damage over time as health.
You have additional dodge rating. You have deal increased damage, tripled while at full health.
You gain a bonus while dual wielding depending on your weapon combination.
You have additional vitality and deal increased damage over time.
When you use a melee attack and hit at least one enemy you gain a stack of Perfection. When you receive a hit you lose all stacks. Each stack of perfection increases your damage.
You have increased critical strike chance and you have a chance to inflict {Critical Vulnerability} on hit.
You have additional health. When you kill an enemy or hit a rare or boss enemy, you regain health for each stack of any {Shroud} on you.
Each stack of Perfection grants [10] dodge rating and armour
Your hits have a chance to shred armor and inflict bleed.
You have a higher critical strike multiplier, but you deal less damage with non-critical hits and damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers).
Skills used by shadows deal increased damage, and you have a chance to gain a stack of {Dusk Shroud} when you use a melee or throwing attack and hit at least one enemy.
[10%] increased damage on full health. Gain double stacks of Perfection on full health
You have additional Dexterity and when you hit a boss or rare enemy you reduce its dodge rating for 8 seconds.

By default you have {Concentration} which grants you more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers). If you are hit by an enemy within 4m you lose concentration for 4 seconds. Subsequent hits do not reset the cooldown.
If you have a bow equipped you gain 1 {Elemental Arrow} per second, up to a maximum of 3. Using a bow attack expends an Elemental Arrow to deal additional bow fire damage and bow lightning damage.
You have a chance to inflict Critical Vulnerability on hit.
If you have a bow equipped you deal increased elemental damage and gain {Elemental Arrows} more frequently.
You can hold additional {Elemental Arrows} and you gain ward per {Elemental Arrow} when you use them.
You have a chance to avoid critical strikes and your critical strikes with bow attacks deal more damage.
You can consume [1] additional {Elemental Arrow} with each bow attack. If you consume 3 arrows with a single attack it has 200% additional shock and ignite chance
When you use a bow attack you gain {Arrow Storm} which increases your bow attack speed for 3 seconds. You can only gain Arrow Storm once every 10 seconds.

Non-elemental bow attacks cannot consume {Elemental Arrows}, but instead generate an Elemental Arrow on use. Consuming an Elemental Arrow also increases the elemental damage of the attack that consumes them.

Chance to gain a stack of Sharpshooter when you hit an enemy based on your how far you are from that enemy, up to a maximum at 10m. Each stack of Sharpshooter increases bow damage and lasts 8 seconds.

When you proc {Arrowstorm} you gain stacks of {Silver Shroud}. Silver Shroud is a buff that gives you 100% chance to dodge the next hit. Dodging a hit with Silver Shroud consumes all stacks, granting you 100 ward per stack.
You have additional poison penetration and bow attacks have additional chance to poison on hit.
Adds {Barrage of Pain} to your Marksman Passive, Bow Mastery. You gain a stack and refresh all existing stacks of Bow Mastery by using a bow attack and hitting at least one enemy.
You have increased mana and mana regen and your bow attacks deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) equal to a portion of their mana cost.
Each stack of Sharpshooter also increases stun chance and adds a chance to shred armour on hit
Adds a chance to cause a {Rain of Arrows} to descend upon your target when you proc {Arrow Storm}. Rain of Arrows is a physical bow attack that hits all enemies in an area around the target.
[15%] increased bow mana cost. If you use a 0 cost attack and hit at least 1 enemy you regain [3] mana
Each stack of Bow Mastery with {Barrage of Pain} also grants additional critical strike multiplier and health gained on crit.
+[2] arrows with multi shot. [20%] increased area with detonating arrow and Hail of Arrows. (2 points allocable)
You have a chance to parry hits, and increased mana regeneration.
You have a chance to gain a stack of {Crimson Shroud} when your {Falcon} or {Ballistas} hit an enemy.
You have additional dodge rating and you gain a portion of your maximum health as endurance threshold if you have not been hit recently.
You deal increased damage while wielding a bow and your bow hits have a chance to grant your {Falcon} additional melee damage for 4 seconds. This has no stack limit.
You deal increased damage and have an additional chance to inflict bleed while wielding a spear.
Your area skills and your minions' area skills deal damage in a larger area.
When you use a certain ability on your bar, you gain 3 stacks of Silver Shroud. This effect has a 10 second cooldown.
You have additional block and a chance to receive a glancing blow. Additionally, you regain health whenever you block or recieve a glancing blow.

{Falcon Strikes} and {Dive Bomb} are now instant cast.

Additionally, {Falcon Strikes} and {Dive Bomb} have a longer cooldown.

You have additional dodge rating and you now have a chance to drop {Caltrops} around you when you dodge and there is an enemy within 4 meters of you.

This effect has a 2 second cooldown.
You have additional armor per point of Dexterity.

You take less damage while moving. Additionally, you have increased movement speed and dodge rating.

These effects are doubled if your {Falcon} has hit an enemy recently.

You regain health when you or your minions crits an enemy.

You have additional critical strike avoidance.
Adds physical damage to your melee attacks and increases their chance to stun.
Adds [1%] block chance and [30] block effectiveness per point.
When you take a hit you have a [6%] chance per point to attack enemies around you with Retribution.
Grants a 25% chance to gain [10] health per point on block
You regain mana and a portion of your missing health when you directly use {Rive}, {Vengeance}, {Smite}, or {Multistrike}.
Retribution has +[25%] critical strike chance per point and [10%] increased damage per point
When you hit an enemy you have an [8%] chance per point to throw an axe towards the nearest enemy. You cannot throw more than one axe every second.
You can dual wield melee weapons by equipping a sword in your off hand. While dual wielding, you have increased attack and cast speed, but take more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).
You have increased attack and cast speed while you have a sword or axe equipped.
Your spells and attacks deal additional void damage.
You leech a portion of your melee and void damage as health.

You have increased health.

Whenever you kill an enemy, you have a chance to absorb 5% of their health.
Your critical strikes deal more damage for each passive point you have invested in the Void Knight tree.

Your melee hits deal increased void damage and instantly kill enemies that are below a health threshold (a percentage of their maximum health).

If you have a similar effect from an item or passive node, then the highest threshold is used.
Your hits have a chance to inflict enemies with {Time Rot} and whenever you kill an enemy afflicted with Time Rot, nearby enemies have a chance to be inflicted with Time Rot.

You deal more void damage (multiplicative with other modifiers).

This effect is doubled if you have less than 30% block chance.
Movement abilities and {Anomaly} cannot echo.

You have a chance to gain a {Void Essence} on kill.

Void Essences last 8 seconds and grant 3% more void damage and 3% more melee damage (both multiplicative with other modifiers), and 15% reduced duration of stuns on you.

You can have a maximum of 3 Void Essences at once, and you cannot gain more than 1 every 4 seconds.

If you take a hit that deals at least 25% of your max health as damage, consume a {Void Essence} to gain {Void Aegis} for 4 seconds, which grants a portion of your maximum health gained as endurance threshold.

While you have 3 or more {Void Essences,} if you drop below 0 mana, you consume 3 void essences to set your mana to 30% of your maximum mana pool.

This effect has a 4 second cooldown.

You have increased melee and throwing attack speed.

Your melee attacks, throwing attacks, and void spells have a higher chance to be echoed 1 second later.

Your melee attacks, throwing attacks, and void spells have a much higher chance to echo, you have increased armor, but you have reduced melee attack speed and throwing attack speed and your skills cost more mana.
You have a higher chance to block hits and take less damage from hits that you block.
If you have been hit recently you increased armor.
You have additional melee and throwing physical and fire damage.
You have additional armor for each hit you have blocked recently (last 4 seconds).
Your throwing attacks cost more mana, but shred physical and fire resistance.
You have increased mana regen and your melee and throwing attacks deal more damage (multiplicative with other modifiers) based on their mana cost.
Adds [7%] chance per point to inflict bleeding and ignite on hit
While you have a shield equipped your blocks are more effective and you deal additional physical damage with throwing attacks.
You have increased critical strike chance while wielding a 2 handed weapon.

Your {Manifest Armor} and {Forged Weapons} deal additional physical damage with their melee attacks.

Additionally, your {Forged Weapons} last longer.
You have additional Dexterity and you take reduced bonus damage from critical strikes.
You and your minions have increased armor and chance to find potions if you have used a potion recently (last 4 seconds).

You take less damage, and this effect is double if you have at least 50% block chance.

Additionally, you have an additional chance to block hits.

While you are using a shield you have additional elemental resistance and deal increased fire damage over time.

These effects also affect your minions.
You take less damage over time (multiplicative with other modifiers) and have additional physical resistance. These bonuses are doubled if you have used a potion recently.
You gain a bonus depending on the type of weapon you are wielding.

You have a chance to cast a shield from {Ring of Shields} when you block a hit and you have additional block effectiveness per shield from {Ring of Shields}.

This effect can trigger up to 3 times every 6 seconds.

Additionally, your minions have increased health and armor.
You and your minions gain increased fire and physical damage.
You are less likely to be stunned, you have a higher chance to block hits and you take less damage from hits that you block.

You deal [4%] increased physical and fire damage per point

+[14] physical and fire penetration per point

When you block you cast {Holy Symbol,} healing yourself and granting you ward over 3 seconds.

This effect has a 3 second cooldown.

Whenever you hit an enemy with a melee attack you have a chance to cast {Divine Bolt,} a blast of holy energy that deals fire damage to a random nearby enemy. This effect can trigger up to twice per second.
{Holy Symbol} also heals allies in an area around you.
{Divine Bolt} deals more damage.
You have additional strength, and you have a chance to shred enemy fire resistance scaling with your Strength.
Your melee and throwing attacks have a chance to cause enemies to bleed, but you have a chance to inflict bleed when an enemy hits you with a melee attack.
You have an increased chance to critically strike and additional critical strike multiplier.
You have a higher chance to block, you regain heath on block and stuns on you last a shorter duration, but you have a lower chance to dodge.

You have a chance to be granted a {Divine Essence} each second while at high health (above 65% of max health).

Divine Essences last 10 seconds and grant 15% increased armor and healing effectiveness. They also reduce damage over time you take by 5%.

You can have a maximum of 3 Divine Essences at once.
You have additional health and endurance threshold.
Bleed you inflict penetrates physical resistance, and you have a chance to be granted increased damage over time if you have received a stack of bleeding from {Penance} recently (last 4 seconds).

You have increased cast speed and you have a chance to cast a {Void Beam} at the target when you directly cast {Smite}. 

This effect can occur up to 2 times per 2 seconds.
You have additional spell damage while you have a shield equipped.
Holy Aura and Symbols of Hope have increased effect of their passive benefits.

You can equip a shield alongside a two handed axe, mace, sword, or spear.

While you have a two handed weapon and a shield equipped, you and your minions deal less damage and have less attack and cast speed, and Haste grants you block chance instead of increased movement speed.
